steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $1,728$. The given function can be rewritten in the form $f\left(x\right)=a{\left(x-h\right)}^{2}+k$, where $a$ is a positive constant and the minimum value, $k$, of the function occurs when the value of $x$ is $h$. By completing the square, $f\left(x\right)={x}^{2}-48x+2,304$ can be written as $f\left(x\right)={x}^{2}-48x+{\left(\frac{48}{2}\right)}^{2}+2,304-{\left(\frac{48}{2}\right)}^{2}$, or $f\left(x\right)={\left(x-24\right)}^{2}+1,728$. This equation is in the form $f\left(x\right)=a{\left(x-h\right)}^{2}+k$, where $a=1$, $h=24$, and $k=1,728$. Therefore, the minimum value of the given function is $1,728$.
